title: Raccoon Removal in Chinatown, Manhattan | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Chinatown, Manhattan. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving Canal Street, Mott Street & all of Chinatown. Call today for fast service!
intro: Chinatown's dense mix of historic tenements, commercial buildings, and bustling restaurants creates ideal conditions for raccoons seeking food and shelter. Our expert raccoon removal team specializes in handling wildlife issues in Chinatown's unique urban environment, from pre-war walk-ups to mixed-use properties along Canal Street and the Bowery. We provide humane, effective raccoon removal with pricing ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation and property size.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Chinatown's diverse property types, from century-old tenements to modern residential buildings. Our technicians understand the unique structural challenges of Chinatown's older buildings and work efficiently to remove raccoons while respecting the neighborhood's vibrant community and business operations.
localContext: Chinatown's proximity to Columbus Park, along with abundant food sources from restaurants and markets along Mott Street, Bayard Street, and East Broadway, makes it particularly attractive to raccoons. The neighborhood's mix of aging infrastructure and dense construction provides numerous entry points in rooflines, fire escapes, and basement areas that require specialized local expertise to secure.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Chinatown?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Chinatown typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, accessibility of entry points, extent of damage, and whether babies are present. Multi-unit buildings and properties requiring extensive exclusion work may be on the higher end of this range.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Chinatown?
faqs.answer: Chinatown attracts raccoons due to its abundance of food sources from restaurants, outdoor markets, and food vendors, combined with older building infrastructure that provides easy access to attics, crawl spaces, and basements. The proximity to Columbus Park and nearby green spaces also brings wildlife into the neighborhood seeking shelter in residential and commercial structures.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Chinatown property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Chinatown for most raccoon removal situations. Initial trapping typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of animals, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. We understand the urgency for business owners and residents and work efficiently to resolve the issue.

faqs.question: Do you handle raccoon damage repair and cleanup in Chinatown buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive raccoon damage restoration including insulation replacement, waste removal, sanitization, and deodorization. We're experienced working with Chinatown's older buildings and can coordinate repairs to rooflines, soffits, vents, and other entry points while maintaining the structural integrity of historic properties.
